articles.title: Forest fires erupt in Rajouri and Solan amid heat wave - NewsBytes
articles.search_term: heatwave (Bilaspur OR Chamba OR Hamirpur OR Kangra OR Kinnaur OR Kullu OR "Lahaul and Spiti" OR Mandi OR Shimla OR "Sirmaur (Sirmour)" OR Solan OR Una) Himachal Pradesh
articles.full_text:
Forest fires erupt in Rajouri and Solan amid heat wave
Big forest fires broke out this week in Jammu and Kashmir's Rajouri district.
Just a few days earlier, Himachal Pradesh's Solan saw a similar blaze, turning the sky hazy over Kyarighat village.
Dry spell, heat wave worsen fires
The fires are being made worse by an ongoing heat wave and dry spell.
